question_text: How often do thoughts about unstable job markets distract you from your studies or work?
If you entered a politically complex workplace tomorrow, how confident are you that you could remain emotionally stable and focused on your work?
How realistic do you feel workplace deadlines are in todays industry?
Do you feel deadlines in college prepare you for real workplace speed?
When a deadline is approaching, how in control do you feel of your work and time?
When deadlines are tight, how often do you feel anxious even before starting the work?
How confident are you that you can handle upcoming academic or work deadlines effectively?
How often do you delay starting work even when deadlines are close?
How physically drained do you feel after completing work under tight deadlines?
After experiencing deadline pressure, how confident are you about handling future deadlines better?
